title: Crunchy Roasted Middle Eastern Wheat Harees
description: A traditional Middle Eastern dish made with roasted wheat, perfect for a comforting meal. This sugar-free-friendly recipe is a great option for a sick day.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the bread flour and salt.
Gradually add in the water, stirring with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough on a wooden board and shape into a rectangle.
Drizzle the olive oil and ghee or vegetable oil over the dough.
Sprinkle the black pepper and cumin over the dough.
Roast the dough in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until it is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the harees from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Break the harees into smaller pieces and serve hot.
